overview: A concierge medical practice offering personalized healthcare with a lower doctor-to-patient ratio. The practice emphasizes holistic, functional medicine through comprehensive exams, advanced lab testing, supplements, personalized nutrition coaching, and wellness programs.
highlights: Complimentary StrideDNA methylation test with membership
Same-day appointments with direct after-hours physician access
targetAudience: Patients seeking personalized, attentive primary care with time for comprehensive health assessment and proactive care planning.
